name: Background Task Management
desc: Microservices architecture pattern decomposes applications into independently deployable services.

comps.d: Component implementing Background Task Management functionality
Component implementing Background Task Management functionality
Component implementing Background Task Management functionality
Component implementing Background Task Management functionality

types.def: (id: ServiceID, name: String, endpoints: Set⟨Endpoint⟩, dependencies: Set⟨ServiceID⟩)

ops.def: $deploy(service: Service, config: Config) → Deployment = validate\_service(service); container := build\_container(service); deploy\_to\_cluster(container, config); register\_service(service); deployment := Deployment(service, container, status=Running); return deployment$

$scale(service: ServiceID, replicas: ℕ) → Effect = current := get\_replica\_count(service); if replicas > current: add\_replicas(service, replicas - current) else if replicas < current: remove\_replicas(service, current - replicas); update\_load\_balancer(service)$

$health\_check(service: ServiceID) → HealthStatus = try: response := service.ping(); if response.success ∧ response.time < threshold: return Healthy else: return Degraded catch error: return Unhealthy$

manif.d: Applied in ai, background tasks systems and architectures
